title: Chinook Water
description: Our house-made sparkling hop water w/ Chinook & other rotating hops. 0% ABV & available to any age.

title: Alapin Apple Ale
description:
Alapin Apple Ale w/ Rotating Flavors. Dry & not-too-sweet, this ale was curated for cider lovers. ABV 7.3%

This ale is gluten-free.

title: The Inferno
description:
Inspired by Terry Peak's Historic Inferno Bar, this Chili Ale will offer a mouthful of blackberry sweetness followed by a delightful heat from Habanero, Serrano & Poblano Peppers.

ABV 5.7%

Check out History Below the Pines on Facebook for info on the The Inferno Project.

title: Thiol By Combat
description: Hazy IPA with thiolized yeast (thiols are flavor compounds) bringing tropical fruit flavors & aromas to this hop-heavy beer. ABV 6%

title: Big Bird Bones Barrel-Aged Bottle (to-go only)
description:
Batch #1 of our Barrel-Aged Series. Our Bird Bones Imperial Stout was aged in malted whiskey barrels for 6 months then blended. Smooth, lightly carbonated, & bold. ABV 16.5%

500ml bottle $16 To-go only.

Interested in a case of this special bottled brew? We'll give you 10% off! Send an email over to hailey@spearfishbrewing.com & we'll get it ready for you!

title: Half a Horse
description:
IPA -

Our seasonal IPA pairs perfectly with downtown Spearfish vibes - easy, familiar, & the right amount of fun. This IPA is a perfect balance of citrus and just a little bitterness.

ABV 6.4%

title: Lemon Bar
description:
Tart! Zesty! Sweet! Made with real lemons. The Lemon Bar is an ode to tart pastry, have fun with this modern take on beer.

ABV 5.1%

title: Festbier
description:
This classic German strong lager is brewed with traditional German grains and hops. 2021 NABA Silver Medal winner. 2021 US Beer Open Silver Medal winner. 2020 US Beer Open Gold Medal winner.

ABV 7.1%

title: The Schwa
description: A classic blonde ale with a tropical twist! Additions of pink guava puree add sweetness, haziness, and body. ABV 5%

title: Bobcat Logic
description: Fermented with lactobacillus, dry with strong lemon tartness, flavors of lemon, alcohol, and champagne. ABV 6.4%

title: Venner Beer
description: Light golden color, sweet malty aroma, and subtle herbal notes. Crisp, clean, and complex. ABV 4.2%

title: Copper Midge
description:
2019 North American Brewers Association beer awards silver medal winner in the American Amber Lager category.
Glowing copper color, toasted malt and caramel sweetness on the palate, gentle floral hop finish.  ABV 5.4%

title: Termes Beer
description: Hazy pale gold with white head, sweet malt and bread flavors, medium body, soft mouthfeel. 5.7% ABV

title: ADVENTUREPANTS!
description: Huge American hop additions! Golden with hop haze, funky pineapple and tropical fruit hop aroma, boozy. 10.2% ABV
